textByHashes.0f08ddc75822317b2cd2db48f4ef57f27d51e94b: Why hello there! I'm Kamfreena. Like the look of my pets? I think they're eyeing you up.
textByHashes.e10c643e7c9b7d2501126094e4737c7605d42b5c: Sorry... I don't get to see the rest of the guild much, stuck up here. The Cyclopes don't talk much you see.
textByHashes.f4e96f82bc2e045bd3edb81a1df0de82be95efe0: Nope! Cyclopes is the plural of cyclops. One cyclops, many cyclopes.
textByHashes.2afa0b65aa5787c9aac5647cb5c322ba3bccc1cd: They're from the far east lands.
textByHashes.4aa2aa38f5b3ba7ca22d2d5de12acc60fef45d86: Ahh.. our guildmaster, Harrallak, went on an expedition there. He brought them back with him.
textByHashes.880851eb022d35f8710fc70a06e380040a189bc4: For the warriors to train on of course! They also drop a rather nice blade.
textByHashes.66c7e77683f67877ca7c929c63a9148adb40f16a: It's a blade you can defend with using your shield hand, like I have.
textByHashes.b91b2c874b09e7a6e8923018513ff3ebc488520b: For every 10 tokens you collect around the guild, you can spend one minute in with my pets. As you get defenders you can show them to me to earn even better ones... but remember if you lose them you'll have
textByHashes.9534e66dc82cf31827330dff56e8c4f7d95133b4: to start at bronze again. I'd advise keeping a spare in your bank.
textByHashes.e09990ab3a004eac97b2bb51ae02ae7d830c92ee: Oh, by the way, you'll need to earn 100 tokens before I'll let you in!
textByHashes.a15851a06010bee997719b9626c6193004b31110: See you back here soon I hope!
textByHashes.0d1b9382cacc517c6f9ee343949b37a1f327a49b: Well, since you haven't shown me a defender to prove your prowess as a warrior,
textByHashes.e8f876c53e54d65601d8c0cb8d70ac52dd71dedd: I'll release some cyclopes which might drop bronze defenders for you to start off with, unless you show me another. Have fun in there.
textByHashes.2f24a64649a4de642f5a8a8a622d8f63b4c522b6: Ahh I see that you have one of the defenders already! Well done.
textByHashes.c6e040d707d100f319a5c72d303a7dff4c3ca4d9: I'll release some cyclopes which might drop the next defender for you. Have fun in there.
textByHashes.939185b06f3e5e7e9125c56cf9ffa55c4aab4b9f: Your time is up, please make your way to the exit.
textByHashes.80bd3a9c22aae4af8a3ac2fa52dc7b353c0d55e7: Next time, please leave as soon as your time is up.
textByHashes.de5a313a6fdbfe4838567711ecdf0c5a36b31ab9: You must keep your attack skillcape or max cape equipped to stay in the area.
textByHashes.2bb088cc6eeb0bd07312b18230274d50b4e1a012: You don't have the defender you earned last time.
textByHashes.8ed0bd77b08d2974e1ebc6309e0f199b4708cc8a: Sorry, but as you've lost any that you earned before I can only let you in to kill the cyclopes that drop the bronze defenders. Go on in when you're ready.
textByHashes.4f042a1cabf651f9449f1b9d9e9c120ed31122f5: Bronze eh? The next cyclopes are ready, toddle in when you're ready.
textByHashes.676f8d7ad0a45f3ed118cbfb0421f240f6f025d9: Wow, iron eh? The next cyclopes are ready, toddle in when you're ready.
textByHashes.8e1a2bfd69935b06d3377f9e3e85ad83dfc18883: Strong as steel eh? The next cyclopes are ready, toddle in when you're ready.
textByHashes.d1c0f02ca0de4ecdc205d5db0025eadd4b47bd8c: Black, hmmm, about half way to Rune then! Keep going! Cyclopes have been released. Enter when you're ready.
textByHashes.6b73b0c0f4a53ac0698953903ade6d61dc688136: Mithril? Getting good at this aren't you! Okay, I've released those cyclopes that sometimes drop adamant defenders. Enter when you're ready.
textByHashes.0456ef106b1e7288ba3832b0b3ef9c6892460870: An adamant defender eh? Trying for the Rune defender I'm betting. Okay, I've released those cyclopes. Enter when you're ready.
textByHashes.9b4eda5978c92691ae5bc23362a82a4a68cbdb2b: Well done, you truly are a brilliant warrior! You should speak to my apprentice Lorelai in the basement for an additional challenge.
textByHashes.efdae79406f8cdbfb4d3bdf58dda6d1406e0af22: If you'd rather stay up here, I've released the cyclopes. Enter when you're ready.
textByHashes.d6b90867f68b0685ebf1572903938f6499511277: Ahh I see that you've collected the highest defender I can offer you. Well done.
textByHashes.bd59db82462052d0adcbf9987da669ab0e401320: There's an old friend of mine named Lorelai in the guild basement. You should go visit her and maybe she'll let you search for a dragon defender.
textByHashes.a853f0ad03d4ce2039343bab252169f96af9c97e: Ahh I see that you have one of the rune defenders already! Well done.
textByHashes.e97dde53235610d6413e4fa25b0166f1a88c0f4d: You should speak to my apprentice Lorelai in the basement and test yourself against even stronger Cyclopes!
textByHashes.c361fdd8c062a514f07f805fb202568d139da65c: The Cyclopes up here will continue to have a chance of dropping rune defenders. Have fun in there.
textByHashes.6b492f114b2922654653fb9153132db9639cae23: Well done! You can only get more Dragon defenders from the basement.
textByHashes.dfc61bbc2e94034b3d1e4dc1d326023189acf986: If you'd rather stay up here, I've released the cyclopes that can drop rune defenders. Enter when you're ready.
textByHashes.a7e938f1d1022356f73c04a7bc3f6a5df775069e: I see you have one of the dragon defenders already! Well done, but you can only get more dragon defenders from the basement.
textByHashes.52fd98415f8b7e20fa0cbce6fdb6e3b9c29a8032: You don't have space to carry them.
textByHashes.1176018ab41bc2e81132f2b6d6658707a2e8cfb7: Of course! Here you go, you've earned token!
textByHashes.2a5bac8ece19398591cdd940c3ea1dbf879868c6: I'm afraid you have not earned any tokens yet. Try some of the activities around the guild to earn some.
textByHashes.f1853cae1a0d37559d71bf62a3ca744d2b05665a: Life isn't fair, that doesn't mean you can't win.
textByHashes.c389d0b0d250f818076b51ee9090bb695cb11e64: Be master of your mind rather than master by your mind.
textByHashes.2835f006e062c6797fd3d69e5f0e4d341acb61d2: A reflection on a pool of water does not reveal its depth.
textByHashes.81101181670534774fe6342ba9be496c5afd5a7c: When you aim for perfection, you discover it's a moving target.
textByHashes.79abd4fe68e383d62a26ee0051ed9d55fa70572c: He who speaks in anger makes his anger heard, but his words forgotten.
textByHashes.b306eb422e2e1d17c91c6c3cdd830df35d3f3a47: Patience and persistence can bring down the tallest trees.
